introSection:
Gravity Max is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Lihpao Land in Houli Hsiang, Taichung, Taiwan. It was one of the first roller coasters to have a tilt section, and the first 90-degree tilt section.

When it first opened in 2002, the roller coaster had yellow track and blue supports. In 2016, the ride was repainted red with black supports.
fullText:
Gravity Max is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Lihpao Land in Houli Hsiang, Taichung, Taiwan. It was one of the first roller coasters to have a tilt section, and the first 90-degree tilt section.

When it first opened in 2002, the roller coaster had yellow track and blue supports. In 2016, the ride was repainted red with black supports.
